description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a polygonal handle and a bold, black geometric logo or design on one side. The cup has a cylindrical body with slightly tapered sides and a wide, open mouth, suitable for holding hot or cold beverages. The handle is angular and faceted, providing a modern, stylized appearance and a comfortable grip. The surface of the cup is smooth and matte, with the logo standing out sharply against the plain background. The interior is also white and appears clean and unadorned. The cup is of a size typical for coffee or tea, making it a common sight in urban environments such as cafes, offices, or public parks.
description: A white ceramic cup with a polygonal handle and a bold black geometric logo, featuring a smooth matte finish and a modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black geometric logo and the polygonal handle on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and no visible logo or decoration.
description_view_2: Side view with the polygonal handle on the left and no visible logo.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the plain side of the cup and a partial glimpse of the logo.
